mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate signals an easing monetary cycle that reduces discount rates for equity valuations, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A 3-month rise in the unemployment rate above 0.3 percentage points signals deteriorating labor market conditions, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 5d returns in > 60% of triggered instances despite negative signal.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous growth in industrial production and employment signals strong supply-side momentum, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days through improved corporate earnings prospects.
failure_condition: Rank IC falls below 0.05 over any 3-year rolling window, or 60-day returns in co-moving periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A 1-month rise in the federal funds rate above 4.5% signals monetary tightening, compressing equity valuations and generating negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 60% of triggered instances despite negative signal.

mechanism_narrative: A sustained 3-month decline in CPI inflation signals stable price environment, reducing equity risk premiums and generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 5-day forward returns in stable periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A 3-month decline in housing starts below 1300 units signals weak demand for construction, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 60% of triggered instances despite negative signal.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous growth in industrial production and employment signals strong supply-side momentum, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days through improved corporate earnings prospects.
failure_condition: Rank IC falls below 0.05 over any 3-year rolling window, or 20-day returns in co-moving periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A 3-month rise in consumer spending (RSAFS) and housing starts (HOUST) above historical thresholds signals robust demand, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days during late-cycle expansions.
failure_condition: Rank IC falls below 0.05 over any 3-year rolling window, or 60-day returns in co-moving periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).
